# Tech Stack

## Technology Stack

Runtime: Node.js >= 20. Backend: Fastify 5, @fastify/static 8, better-sqlite3 11 (WAL mode, 3s busy timeout). Frontend: Vanilla JS ES modules, Chart.js 4 (CDN), Cytoscape.js 3 (CDN). Service: macOS launchd (com.open-pulse server, com.open-pulse.daily-review daily 3 AM). Tests: Node.js built-in test runner (node --test). Package.json specifies exact versions.

_Source: `package.json, CLAUDE.md`_

_Tags: `nodejs`, `fastify`, `sqlite`, `javascript`_
